name: Guanaco 65B
license: Apache-2.0 (LoRA adapter weights); base LLaMA weights remain under Meta's non-commercial research license
note: 4-bit QLoRA fine-tune of LLaMA 65B on OASST1, reaching 99.3% of ChatGPT's performance on the Vicuna benchmark in ~24 GPU-hours on one 48GB GPU.
tpsNote: 65B does not fit in a single RTX 4090's 24GB VRAM even at Q4 (~39GB needed); no verified single-GPU llama.cpp measurement found.

results.notes: Vicuna benchmark Elo rating (human-judged); GPT-4-judged Elo was 1022. Paper separately reports reaching 99.3% of ChatGPT's performance level on this benchmark.
5-shot MMLU test accuracy listed on the official model card (LLaMA-65B baseline scored 63.4% on the same table); also matches Table 5 of the QLoRA paper (arxiv 2305.14314).

GPT-4-judged Elo rating on the OpenAssistant benchmark (953 prompts), rank 3 - confirmed on the HF model card and in the QLoRA paper's Table 7; this benchmark had no entry at all yet for the 65B model.
GPT-4-judged MT-Bench score for Guanaco-65B from the LMSYS Chatbot Arena Leaderboard Week 8 update ('Introducing MT-Bench and Vicuna-33B').

AlpacaEval (GPT-4 annotator) win rate vs. text-davinci-003 reference = 71.80% (avg response length 1249 tokens), status 'verified' in the official tatsu-lab/alpaca_eval leaderboard CSV; row links directly to https://huggingface.co/timdettmers/guanaco-65b and to the model's raw outputs at results/guanaco-65b/model_outputs.json in the same repo. The newer length-controlled win rate for this entry is 54.69%, but that metric postdates this model and the classic win_rate is the metric the leaderboard originally reported it under.

ARC-Challenge 25-shot acc_norm from the HF Open LLM Leaderboard (old) details dataset for TheBloke/guanaco-65B-HF, a full-weights merge of the same timdettmers/guanaco-65b QLoRA adapter (identical model weights, different packaging format). Verified via raw results_2023-07-25T19:41:45.375855.json (arc_challenge acc_norm 0.6544).
HellaSwag 10-shot acc_norm from the same HF Open LLM Leaderboard (old) details dataset / raw JSON run (hellaswag acc_norm 0.8647) for the merged full-weights repackaging of guanaco-65b.

TruthfulQA MC2 0-shot from the same HF Open LLM Leaderboard (old) details dataset raw JSON (truthfulqa_mc mc2 0.5281). Distinct from the corpus's existing MMLU entry; no TruthfulQA had been tracked for the 65B model before.
Winogrande 5-shot accuracy from the HF Open LLM Leaderboard (old) details dataset, later run (results_2023-10-23T03-09-40.214751.json, harness|winogrande|5 acc 0.823994).
GSM8K 5-shot accuracy from the same HF Open LLM Leaderboard (old) details dataset run (harness|gsm8k|5 acc 0.260045).

verificationNotes: Confirmed real model via HF model card (fetched): 65B params, Apache-2.0 adapter license, Vicuna Elo human=1023/GPT-4=1022 literally match the page. releaseDate 2023-05-23 confirmed via arXiv (2305.14314). The paper's full text confirms 99.3% and '24 hours on a single [48GB] professional GPU' specifically describe the 65B (largest/best) model, so this note is correct as-is (no change needed, unlike the 33B record).
